title: BudgetPilot
intent: Budget planning with continuous variance intelligence and corrective actions
requirements: planning module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
variance module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
reforecasting module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
approvals module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
alerts module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
reporting module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
